summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of LOGITAG_NEW React application login page. All core functionality works correctly.

external_api_notes.issue: Returns authentication errors as expected - we don't control this backend

passed_tests: Login page loads correctly with User and Password fields
Login form validation works (empty fields show proper validation)
Continue button is visible and clickable
Forgot Password link is visible and functional
Page styling/CSS loads correctly (background image, form layout)
Form submission works and shows authentication dialog
Forgot Password dialog opens and closes properly
No JavaScript console errors that break the UI
